lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Looking to get across to the Auburn Valley?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Alright then, let's get going...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Need a guide to get you to Quetzacalli?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Alright then, let's get going...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: As you wish.

sections.title: When spoken to for the first time

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Looking to get across to the Auburn Valley?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Over the mountains?

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Indeed. The journey isn't too long, but I can help you avoid the dangerous stretches, letting you focus on enjoying the fresh mountain air.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you charge anything for the journey?

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Nothing at all! So, shall we?

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Need a guide to get you to Quetzacalli?

lines.speaker: Player
